mapper.sql: SELECT CAST(sp.id AS text) AS id, sp.provider, sp.external_place_id, a.title AS name, CONCAT_WS(' ', a.addr1, a.addr2) AS address, a.latitude AS lat, a.longitude AS lng, img.public_url AS thumbnail_url, ct.content_type_name AS category, sp.created_at FROM preference.user_saved_places sp LEFT JOIN tourism_source.attractions a ON sp.provider = 'KTO' AND CAST(a.content_id AS text) = sp.external_place_id LEFT JOIN tourism_source.contenttypes ct ON ct.content_type_id = a.content_type_id LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT public_url FROM tourism_source.attraction_images WHERE attraction_no = a.no AND is_active = true ORDER BY display_order ASC, created_at ASC LIMIT 1 ) img ON true
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO preference.user_saved_places ( id, user_id, provider, external_place_id ) VALUES ( CAST(#{id} AS uuid), CAST(#{userId} AS uuid), #{provider}, #{externalPlaceId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE preference.user_saved_places SET deleted_at = NULL, created_at = now() WHERE id = CAST(#{savedPlaceId} AS uuid)
mapper.select: SELECT count(*) FROM preference.user_saved_places WHERE user_id = CAST(#{userId} AS uuid) AND deleted_at IS NULL
